text: Trump arrives in China ahead of crucial Xi meeting - CNN

text: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions and orders new trial - CNN
fullText: The South Carolina Supreme Court on Wednesday overturned Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions and ordered a new trial in the killing of his wife and son in June 2021, saying the trial was marred by the “improper” influence of the county clerk.

text: PM has 'full confidence' in Streeting, No 10 says, as health secretary's allies expect him to launch challenge - BBC

text: Jason Collins, the first openly gay NBA player, dies at 47 from brain cancer - NBC News
fullText: Jason Collins, a longtime NBA center who became the first man to come out as openly gay while playing in any of America’s four leading professional sports leagues, died Tuesday following months of treatment for glioblastoma, his family said.

text: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022 - CNBC
